info.title: CLI tool to manage Azure Devops Agent Pools
info.description: CLI tool to manage Azure Devops Agent Pools

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: CLI to manage pools and agents in Azure Devops.

commands.name: alias
commands.description: List or configure Azure Devops Url and credentials.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List Azure Devops stored URLs and Credentials

commands.name: set
commands.description: List Azure Devops stored URLs and Credentials.

commands.name: agent
commands.description: Manage agents in a agent pool

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all Agent of a Agent Pool.

commands.name: allpools
commands.description: Disable a agent by name in all agent pools.

commands.name: allpools
commands.description: Enable a agent by name in all agent pools.
